title: ProcessMaker Process
description: Schema for a ProcessMaker BPMN 2.0 process definition

bpmn.description: BPMN 2.0 XML string defining the process flow

process_category_id.description: ID of the category this process belongs to

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns the process

manager_id.description: ID of the manager assigned to the process

cancel_screen_id.description: ID of the screen shown when a request is cancelled

request_detail_screen_id.description: ID of the screen shown in the request detail view

is_valid.description: Whether the process BPMN definition is valid

created_at.description: Timestamp when the process was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the process was last updated

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the process was soft-deleted
